title: Living in Boulder vlog 5 - 29 - 2018: Google Earthing BouldeRoman Cloud Cities

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his Google Earth project building elaborate 'cloud cities' above 11,500 feet in the Boulder/Rocky Mountain area, describing the many structures he has placed including castles, monasteries, Roman landmarks, the Asterix village, a tiny house village, race tracks, and Roman baths. He shares his creative process and plans to add Delphi next, and mentions his fiancée is visiting for two weeks.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Prefers not to scout ahead — working blind keeps interest and motivation alive
Deeply invested and excited; the desire to see the finished result drives the work

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was working on cloud cities above 11,500 feet where there's perpetual sunshine.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I recreated a neighborhood of Beverly Hills and another village, along with castles and big houses.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm completing every single area in Boulder County, from Longspeak down to Lake City, Mary's Glacier area.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I've been placing castles in lakes and next to water, and castles on cliffs or hills.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I built a church called Saint Michael in France that gets covered by water during high tide.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I placed a monastery in Greece on top of a cliff and am building a temple and a church next to it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm planning to build Delphi as a mountainside village.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I expanded on the story of the Asterix village, where they drink a magic potion and become super strong.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I built a building that extends from the lake below Longspeak up to the height of Longspeak.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I created an under-the-end end-knowledge area next to Asterix Village.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I surrounded Asterix Village with Roman regions inspired by the Jewish wars in 78-80 AD.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I built an Indian village next to a circle of wagons.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I made a tiny house village around two or three lakes.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I placed the Circus Maximus above my four-kilometer track.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I built the biggest track in the world, the Indianapolis Speedway, with a pentagon inside it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I placed the biggest baths in Rome next to the track.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm planning to build an island in France that gets covered by water at high tide, with a town and castle on it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I work fast and get into a rhythm to make things look good.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have to clean my household and prepare for my fiancée's visit.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to hike in the mountains to check out what I'm building.

transcript.text: Hello, Living in Boulder V-Log. It's 5.57 p.m. on May 29th, Tuesday. So, I'm doing a V-Log right now because I didn't do one in the last couple days.
Last time I did a V-Log, I'm pretty sure that I said that I did, I was working on all the cloud cities, meaning cities above like 11,500 feet where it's perpetual sunshine.
And I did all these villages and towns recreating a neighborhood of Beverly Hills and another village and then all these castles and big houses and stuff.
So, since then, I'm just working on completing every single area up there because it's prime real estate and it's beautiful and it's not too much, but it's a lot.
All of Boulder County. Well, everything from Longs Peak down to like St. Mary's Glacier area.
So, that's a little bit farther south than Boulder County, but everything within the area of Boulder.
So, yeah, there's a lot of cool stuff to work on. So, I've just been dumping stuff down.
So, I got every castle, or I'm going to get every castle that's in water or next to water, put them inside the lakes because there's lots of lakes.
Every single castle that's on top of a cliff, put it on the cliff.
On the top of the hill are even the ones on the cliff sides.
So, ever since I did my last video, I did this church called St. Mon Michael or something in France that gets covered up by water and high tide.
So, I put that on the top of a mountain and a little village. It includes a village that's on the side of the mountain.
And it's all above Fog Line.
And then, I did that monastery in Greece that's on top of a cliff.
I put that on top of a mountain.
And then, I'm making a road that goes on the side of a cliff.
And on that, I'm building the temple, or what I'll call the sister to the temple in China that's on the cliff.
And it goes around to the mountain.
And that's where I'm going to put Delphi, but I haven't done it yet.
I only got up with the idea last night or this morning when I went to sleep.
I was working until, like, 7.30 this morning.
So, then I've been working for a couple hours.
I got about, like, 30 or something.
So, yeah, I was super excited about that.
And I totally want to do that now.
That's what keeps me going in all this work.
It's just I want to make it.
You know, I align me wanting to know what it looks like to doing the actual work.
I don't do any scouting first.
Right?
I just do it because that keeps the entrance high to keep working.
So, yeah, I'm going to do Delphi.
That's a mountainside village, and we all know Delphi.
So, I'll put that on the side of the mountain.
And the track at the top, because the track was at the top.
That would be awesome.
And then, oh, I put a tent on the top of a spire.
I did the Asterix village and the guy's house.
I think it's the medicine man, which is on a tree.
I expanded on their story.
They have a story where they all drink the magic potion that makes them invincible.
They're super strong, so the Romans can't, who have garrisons surrounding them, can't ever defeat them,
Even though they've defeated all of Gaul already.
So, my story is, and then he pours a little bit of the potion on his tree,
And it turns into the tallest redwood tree in the world.
And so, if you perch him on top of that, he becomes above cloud line,
And he gets to be up there with all the Romans, which pisses them off.
So, I also have a thing of this building, because in my story, they can build whatever,
Just because I can build whatever I want.
They have this building that goes out from the lake below Longspeak all the way up to the height of Longspeak,
Because then they jump off it and fall into the lake.
But, and then next to Asterix village, I have this unearthed Indian village,
Which is about the same size.
And then I have all of the, the Roman, they had three Roman regions, you can still see,
Surrounding Masada, when the Romans besieged Masada in the Jewish wars in 70 AD,
Which is what paid for the Colosseum.
So, I screen captured those, and those are the ones,
I have three of those surrounding Asterix village of Obama, you know,
Just really close, just like it looks in the, in the cartoon.
So, and then they have a lake and a boat, just like in the cartoon.
Um, we have a lake, they want to see, but.
And then, uh, oh, and I have a section that has an Indian village next to a,
A circled wagons.
And, um, and then tents, I threw tents all over the place.
All the good tent areas.
Oh, I made a tiny house village.
It surrounds two, goes around the periphery of two lakes.
Three lakes.
Two big ones and a smaller one.
And, uh, I'm forgetting a good one.
Oh, yeah.
And then Masada itself, I put up on the top of a mountain.
Um, and, um, because that was, that's up on the top of a mountain.
Um, oh, and I put the, uh, the Circus Maximus above my big four-kilometer track.
I put a four-kilometer track on the top of a mountain with the Pentagon inside of it.
Uh, the biggest track in the world, the Indianapolis Speedway.
And then next to it on either sides are the biggest, uh, baths in Rome.
And then above it, I think another bath.
Uh, so three baths in Rome and then the Circus Maximus all on this one mountain.
Uh, the one just north of, uh, Beverly Hills near Red.
I don't know the names of these mountains.
But, um, yeah, so I was just, before I was going to do this video where I was,
Because I forgot about, um, Delphi.
But I'm going to do Delphi right now that I remember.
But before I made this video, I was starting to actually build that island that gets covered up by water.

Um, it's got a town on a hill with a castle on the top.
Yeah, I want to build that and see if I can knock that out.
The thing is, when I work it all at once, I can get into a rhythm where I can go real fast and just go, you know.
And then make it look good in the end.

I don't have much time.
I'm probably going to have to work.

Because my, uh, my fiancé is coming to visit me for two weeks.

But then that means I get to do recon, what I'm doing.
I get to go and hike every day up in the mountains and check out what I'm building.
Okay, peace out.
I'm hungry.
